name: Mandrin Orange and Green Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Med bowl of mixed greens (leaf romaine and regular)
DRESSING - 1/3 cup Wine vinegar, 1/2 cup Sugar, 1 cup Salad oil, 1 t Salt, 1 t Dry mustard, 2 T Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mixed greens by combining leaf romaine and regular lettuce.
2. Slice the mandarin oranges into bite-sized pieces.
3. Chop the pecans finely.
4. Cut purple onions into rings for garnish.
5. Whisk together the dressing ingredients: wine vinegar, sugar, salad oil, salt, dry mustard, and water.
6. Toss the mixed greens with the mandarin orange slices and chopped pecans.
7. Drizzle the dressing over the salad.
8. Garnish with onion rings.
9. Serve immediately.
